summary: Iteration 77: Complete testing of NEW Global Annual Pricing Config feature. All 10 backend API tests pass, all frontend features verified working.

tests.description: GET /api/admin/subscribers/pricing-config returns config with all required fields
Verify default programs have correct structure (name, duration_value, duration_unit)
PUT pricing config updates package name and persists
PUT pricing config updates currency-specific pricing
PUT pricing config adds new included program
PUT pricing config updates default_sessions_current and carry_forward

details: 'Package Config' button visible in Annual Subscribers tab header
Button text toggles between 'Package Config' and 'Hide Config'
Clicking opens/closes the Global Annual Package Structure editor
Editor shows in purple/amber gradient container
Fields present: Package Name, Duration (months), Default Sessions, Carry Forward
Pricing by Currency row with inputs for INR/USD/AED/EUR/GBP
Included Programs section with tags showing 'name (duration unit)'
Tags show: AWRP (12 months), Money Magic Multiplier (6 months), Bi-Annual Downloads (2 sessions), Quarterly Meetups (4 sessions)
Remove (X) button on each program tag
Add program input with duration value, duration unit dropdown, + button
'Save Config' button present
Clicking Save Config persists changes to database
Toast message 'Package config saved' appears on success
Changes verified by page reload - values persist
Green 'Auto-filled from package config' badge shows on new subscriber form
Annual Program auto-filled with package_name from config
Total Fee auto-filled with INR pricing from config (50000)
Bi-Annual DL auto-filled (2 from Bi-Annual Downloads program)
Quarterly Rel auto-filled (4 from Quarterly Meetups program)
Sessions: Current=12, Total=12, Yet to Avail=12 from config
Programs in Package auto-populated with all included_programs names
When Start Date is entered, End Date auto-calculates based on duration_months from config
Tested: Start Date 2026-04-01 → End Date 2027-04-01 (+12 months)
When Currency dropdown changes, Total Fee updates to match config pricing
Tested: INR (50000) → USD (600) correctly updated
Edit existing subscriber form does NOT show 'Auto-filled from package config' badge
Form shows 'Edit Subscriber' title (not 'Add New Subscriber')
All existing subscriber data preserved (Priya Sharma with Quad Layer Healing program)
EMI schedule, sessions, programs all preserved from existing data
Programs tab loads correctly
Sessions tab accessible
Newsletter Subscribers tab accessible (separate from Annual Subscribers)

seed_data_creation: Test config changes (TEST_Updated package name, pricing changes, program additions) are restored to original values after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 tested the NEW Global Annual Pricing Config feature. Config is stored in 'annual_pricing_config' collection. Default config includes: Annual Healing Package, 12 months duration, INR 50000/USD 600/AED 2200/EUR 550/GBP 470 pricing, 4 included programs (AWRP, Money Magic Multiplier, Bi-Annual Downloads, Quarterly Meetups), 12 default sessions. The SubscriberForm component auto-fills from config for new subscribers, auto-calculates end date from start date, and updates total fee when currency changes. Edit form preserves existing data without auto-fill.
